refund_policy.policy_text: IPFoxy shall not provide refunds or credits for any reason.
refund_policy.notes: Services are provided on a prepaid basis. After IPFoxy agent is officially sold, no refund or replacement service is accepted due to abuse prevention. Contact customer service for use issues.

terms_of_service.summary: Payment Rules and Refund Policy: Services provided on prepaid basis with no refunds for any reason.

acceptable_use_policy.notes: No explicit Acceptable Use Policy found.

support.notes: Online customer service available for use-related issues. Help center provides guides.
